title: Untitled Creature Story
description: A mysterious tale about Kenny Lewis, gold discovery, and strange encounters beneath the New Haven Canal. A story of obsession, ancient secrets, and something watching from the depths.
notes: Needs completion and editing. Contains elements of cosmic horror and local Connecticut history.

title: Creatures in the Tall Grass
description: A feature film script about supernatural encounters in rural Connecticut. Act I focuses on establishing characters and the mysterious events that begin to unfold.
notes: Act I outline locked. Test shoots planned with RED Komodo + Sirui anamorphic. Resolve pipeline confirmed.

title: Ahoy Indie Media Blog
description: Technical blog posts about web development, indie media, and creative coding projects.
notes: Part of the Ahoy Indie Media MVP. Will cover React, Next.js, and indie media development.

title: Teaching Curriculum Documentation
description: Documentation for the 4 ready-to-run curricula: AI Art & Creative Coding, Unreal World Building, Podcasting + Storytelling, and Front-End Design & Full-Stack.
notes: Each curriculum needs syllabus, supply list, and 5-session lesson plans.

title: The Havens
description: Stories from the Havens, including the mayoral race story.
notes: Collection of stories set in the Havens.

title: Personal Journal
description: A daily log of thoughts, feelings, and events.
notes: Used for processing emotions and daily reflections.

title: Tello: A Bio Pic
description: A biographical project honoring the life and memory of Tello.

title: Words & Ideas
description: A collection of poems, premises, and miscellaneous thoughts from 2026.

title: Land Planning
description: Research and plans for property development, including Catskill and cottage builds.
notes: Financial calculations and specifications for land projects.
